---
title: "Cursos publicados"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
GitHub Pages
:::

Materiales publicados y organizados en una pagina simple.
:::

## Cursos

::: {.course-grid}
::: {.course-card}
[Agentes](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/agentes/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Arquitectura](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/arquitectura/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Backend](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/backend/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Camino](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/camino/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Cancionero](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cancionero/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Carro](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/carro/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Cocina](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/cocina/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Computacion](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/computacion/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[DaVinci](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/davinci/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Docker](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/docker/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[FIFA 2026](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/fifa2026/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[GitHub](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/github/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Linux](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/linux/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[LWMMM](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/LWMMM/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[MMM](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/mmm/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[OBS](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/obs/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Ollama](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/ollama/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Positron](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/positron/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Python](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/python/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Quarto](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/quarto/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[RStudio](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/rstudio/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Salud](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/salud/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Servidor](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/servidor/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[Ubuntu](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/ubuntu/)
:::
::: {.course-card}
[VSCode](https://dgonxalex80.github.io/vscode/)
:::
:::
